# `rbt` CLI Reference

The `rbt` command is the single operational surface of the project — every
setup, import, schema, tile-generation, and maintenance task dispatches
through it. This page is generated from the CLI's own help text at docs build
time, so it is always in sync with the code.

!!! tip "Global options come first"
    Options like `--verbose`, `--debug`, and `--no-log-file` belong to the
    top-level command and must appear **before** the subcommand:
    `rbt --no-log-file tiles --dry-run`.

RBT Vector Tiles CLI — tile generation, OSM updates, and database setup.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `-v, --verbose`: Verbose logging.
* `--debug`: Debug-level logging.
* `--log-file PATH`: Duplicate logs to this file (defaults to $SHARED_LOG_DIR/rbt_&lt;ts&gt;.log for mutating commands).
* `--no-log-file`: Disable file logging entirely (useful for tests and short read-only commands).
* `--version`: Show version and exit.
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

**Commands**:

* `validate`: Pre-flight validation: config, tools,...
* `smoke`: End-to-end sanity check (validate,...
* `health`: Fast liveness probe used by the Docker...
* `tiles`: Generate Mapbox Vector Tiles from the RBT...
* `osm`: Continuous OSM updates and diff management.
* `setup`: Database initialization helpers.
* `import`: Run individual data importers (OSM,...
* `export`: Export standalone data artifacts (Overture...
* `layers`: Inspect the declarative layer registry.
* `schema`: Run database schema SQL (rbt.* views).

## `rbt validate`

Pre-flight validation: config, tools, database, disk, and memory.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt validate [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt smoke`

End-to-end sanity check (validate, bootstrap, schemas, tile dry-runs).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt smoke [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt health`

Fast liveness probe used by the Docker HEALTHCHECK.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt health [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt tiles`

Generate Mapbox Vector Tiles from the RBT database.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt tiles [OPTIONS] [COMMAND] [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `--layer-type [physical|cultural|all]`: [default: all]
* `--projection [3857|3395|4326|all]`: [default: all]
* `--all`: Generate every layer in every projection.
* `--tile-join / --no-tile-join`: [default: tile-join]
* `--add-btis / --no-btis`: [default: add-btis]
* `-d, --dry-run`
* `--force`: Re-export cached FlatGeoBuf files (use after a database refresh).
* `--aeroway`
* `--boundary`
* `--building`
* `--cemetery`
* `--geonames`
* `--transportation`
* `--utilities`
* `--other`
* `--builtuparea`
* `--contour`
* `--glacier`
* `--landcover`
* `--mountain`
* `--park`
* `--water`
* `--water-label`
* `--waterway`
* `--inland-water`
* `--layer TEXT`: Generate a specific layer by registry key (repeatable).
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

**Commands**:

* `layer`: Generate a single layer in a single...

### `rbt tiles layer`

Generate a single layer in a single projection.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt tiles layer [OPTIONS] LAYER_KEY
```

**Arguments**:

* `LAYER_KEY`: Layer key from config/layers.yml  [required]

**Options**:

* `--projection [3857|3395|4326|all]`: [default: 3857]
* `--dry-run`
* `--force`: Re-export cached FlatGeoBuf files.
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt osm`

Continuous OSM updates and diff management.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt osm [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

**Commands**:

* `run`: Start the continuous imposm run loop...
* `status`: Show whether updates are running and the...
* `stop`: Stop a running `rbt osm run` supervisor.
* `import`: Run the one-time OSM data importer.

### `rbt osm run`

Start the continuous imposm run loop (blocks until stopped).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt osm run [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt osm status`

Show whether updates are running and the last applied OSM change.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt osm status [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt osm stop`

Stop a running `rbt osm run` supervisor.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt osm stop [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt osm import`

Run the one-time OSM data importer.

Alias for ``rbt import osm``, kept here too since it reads naturally
alongside ``run``/``status``/``stop``; prefer ``rbt import osm`` in new
scripts for consistency with the other data sources.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt osm import [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--stage [all|download-planet|download-diffs|merge-diffs|apply-changes|import|import-diff]`: Pipeline stage to run (default: the full download → import workflow).  [default: all]
* `--start-seq INTEGER`: First replication diff sequence (download-diffs).
* `--end-seq INTEGER`: Last replication diff sequence (download-diffs).
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt setup`

Database initialization helpers.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt setup [OPTIONS] [COMMAND] [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `--all`
* `--setup-database`
* `--import-osm-data`
* `--import-reference-data`
* `--import-geonames`
* `--import-buildings`
* `--process-schemas`
* `--osm-stage [all|download-planet|download-diffs|merge-diffs|apply-changes|import|import-diff]`: OSM import stage to run within setup (default: the full workflow).  [default: all]
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt import`

Run individual data importers (OSM, GeoNames, Overture, etc.).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt import [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

**Commands**:

* `osm`: One-time OSM data import (planet download,...
* `reference`: Import reference datasets (FieldMaps,...
* `geonames`: Import NGA GNS + USGS GNIS geographic names.
* `buildings`: Import Overture Maps buildings from S3.

### `rbt import osm`

One-time OSM data import (planet download, diffs, imposm import).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt import osm [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--stage [all|download-planet|download-diffs|merge-diffs|apply-changes|import|import-diff]`: Pipeline stage to run (default: the full download → import workflow).  [default: all]
* `--start-seq INTEGER`: First replication diff sequence (download-diffs).
* `--end-seq INTEGER`: Last replication diff sequence (download-diffs).
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt import reference`

Import reference datasets (FieldMaps, Natural Earth, OurAirports, OSM water, MIRTA).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt import reference [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--only TEXT`: Import only the named dataset(s) (repeatable; see --list).
* `--parallel`: Run every dataset in one pool instead of the fieldmaps-first phases.
* `--list`: List dataset names and exit.
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt import geonames`

Import NGA GNS + USGS GNIS geographic names.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt import geonames [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--only TEXT`: Import only the named dataset(s) (repeatable; see --list).
* `--list`: List dataset names and exit.
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt import buildings`

Import Overture Maps buildings from S3.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt import buildings [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--skip-parts`: Skip the optional building_part ingest.
* `--release TEXT`: Overture release to sync (default: pinned in Settings).
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt export`

Export standalone data artifacts (Overture buildings → FlatGeobuf).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt export [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

**Commands**:

* `buildings`: Export Overture buildings directly to...

### `rbt export buildings`

Export Overture buildings directly to FlatGeobuf via DuckDB (no PostGIS).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt export buildings [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--output-dir PATH`: Directory for the .fgb outputs (default: $OVERTURE_EXPORT_DIR).
* `--release TEXT`: Overture release to read (default: pinned in Settings).
* `--keep-db`: Keep the temporary DuckDB database after a successful run.
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt layers`

Inspect the declarative layer registry.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt layers [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

**Commands**:

* `list`: List every known layer and its tippecanoe...
* `show`: Print a single layer&#x27;s full definition.

### `rbt layers list`

List every known layer and its tippecanoe configuration.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt layers list [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--layer-type [physical|cultural|all]`: [default: all]
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt layers show`

Print a single layer&#x27;s full definition.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt layers show [OPTIONS] LAYER_KEY
```

**Arguments**:

* `LAYER_KEY`: [required]

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

## `rbt schema`

Run database schema SQL (rbt.* views).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt schema [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

**Commands**:

* `list`: List the registered schema SQL units.
* `run`: Execute schema SQL files via psql...

### `rbt schema list`

List the registered schema SQL units.

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt schema list [OPTIONS]
```

**Options**:

* `--help`: Show this message and exit.

### `rbt schema run`

Execute schema SQL files via psql (creates/refreshes the rbt.* views).

**Usage**:

```console
$ rbt schema run [OPTIONS] [KEYS]...
```

**Arguments**:

* `[KEYS]...`: Schema keys (see `rbt schema list`).

**Options**:

* `--type [physical|cultural|all]`: Run every schema of this layer type.
* `--all`: Run every registered schema.
* `--dry-run`
* `--help`: Show this message and exit.
